question: Is the gown colored deep emerald green?
Does the gown retain a visible sequin texture with individual sparkle points, avoiding a flat or uniform color fill?
Are the highlight directions and light reflections on the gown consistent with the original scene lighting?
Do the motion-blurred areas of the gown show smooth color transitions without pixelation, banding, or abrupt edges?
Are the shoes colored ivory white?
Do the shoes exhibit a soft satin finish with diffuse reflections, replacing the sharp glossy reflections of the original patent leather?
Is the model's identity (face, hair, and skin tone) preserved and unchanged?
Are the structural details of the clothing (gown silhouette, strap style, shoe shape) preserved?
Are the background elements, including the audience silhouettes and lit text signs, unchanged?
Is the white runway floor free from unwanted green or ivory color bleeding?
Are the edges of the gown and shoes clean, avoiding masking halos or jagged cutouts against the background?
